user_visible_error: ERR_NGROK_3004 during source digest proof run
ERR_NGROK_3200 endpoint offline during immediate health check
process_scan: No matching codex/ask_codex_knowledge_source/AIMO processes after recovery.
probable_cause: Network/ngrok tunnel interruption between ChatGPT and local Bridge, possibly due brief internet loss, IP/session change, or tunnel endpoint restart. Local process may continue/finish even while UI loses bridge connectivity.
bridge_hardening_candidates: managed run heartbeat and resumable run-status polling by run_id
bridge outage journal event with last command sha, run_id, cwd, head, dirty state
local run ledger independent of ngrok connection
reconnect recovery command: health -> context -> process scan -> last managed run report -> repo status
avoid assuming failed command when transport fails; inspect local artifacts first
boundary: Transport interruption is not proof of local command failure. Always recover by checking local run artifacts and process state.
